title: Atlas Engine
summary: Map the Akasha knowledge space, showing domains, engines, gaps, bridges, and growth fronts as navigable terrain rather than a pile of repos.
why: The uploaded tree already behaves like a small civilization. Akasha needs a cartographer before the roads vanish into the fog.
notes: Should ingest repo manifests, request objects, and domain packs.
Outputs may include graph views, frontier lists, and dependency maps.
Pairs naturally with akasha-world and akasha-constellation.
